story.text: The escalated-and-fenced free-form lane becomes a temporary gateway grant: not 'this agent may range freely' but 'this summon may cross these gateways, in this neighborhood, for this through-line, under this guard policy, until this budget expires.' Value: the free-form lane gets teeth (bounded crossing rights, audited, time/budget-boxed) instead of being an unaudited hole.

_note: A foreign review's finding, returned to package 'landing-throughput' and landed as proposed work through the inbound envoy seam (done-line 0059). The value gate judges the story; bdo's confirm-arc on 'epic.landing-throughput-response' queues the whole review at once. Never mutated — the fold over .ai-native/log/ is the live state (D-5).
